debug_info.goal:
U : Type
⊢ ctble U ↔ ∃ f, one_to_one f

proof:
by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum] at h
    obtain ⟨S, hS⟩ := h
    obtain ⟨phi, psi, h1, h2⟩ := (equinum_iff_inverse_pair S U).mp hS
    exists (λ u => (psi u).val)
    intros u1 u2 heq
    have h3 : psi u1 = psi u2 := Subtype.ext heq
    have h4 : phi (psi u1) = phi (psi u2) := congrArg phi h3
    have h5 : phi (psi u1) = u1 := congr_fun h1 u1
    have h6 : phi (psi u2) = u2 := congr_fun h1 u2
    rw [h5, h6] at h4
    exact h4
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum]
    let S : Set Nat := range f
    exists S
    apply (equinum_iff_inverse_pair S U).mpr
    let phi (s : S) : U := Classical.choose s.property
    let psi (u : U) : S := ⟨f u, ⟨u, rfl⟩⟩
    exists phi, psi
    apply And.intro
    · apply funext; intro u
      have h1 : f (phi (psi u)) = f u := Classical.choose_spec (psi u).property
      exact hf (phi (psi u)) u h1
    · apply funext; intro s
      apply Subtype.ext
      exact Classical.choose_spec s.property
successful_attempts:
by

    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum] at h

    exists (λ u => (psi u).val)

    have h3 : psi u1 = psi u2 := Subtype.ext heq
    have h4 : phi (psi u1) = phi (psi u2) := congrArg phi h3
    have h5 : phi (psi u1) = u1 := congr_fun h1 u1
    have h6 : phi (psi u2) = u2 := congr_fun h1 u2
    rw [h5, h6] at h4
    exact h4
  · intro ⟨f, hf⟩
    rw [ctble_iff_set_nat_equinum]
    let S : Set Nat := range f
    exists S
    apply (equinum_iff_inverse_pair S U).mpr
